what-is-mana.title: What is Mana?
what-is-mana.body:
In the old world, we used fiat money—an illusion created from debt that enforced scarcity and forced us to compete for the right to exist.

Mana is not a currency. It cannot be hoarded, taxed, or traded transactionally. It is a pure representation of life energy and physical reality.

Mana consists of Natural Resources (water, earth, sunlight) and Human Capital (your time, presence, and creation). When you offer your skills, you do not 'earn' anything; you resonate your Mana into the network, enriching the community and amplifying collective abundance. You cannot buy Mana; you can only embody it.

genesis-resonance.title: Why a physical meeting?
genesis-resonance.body: In the old world, digital identity was verified by corporations that harvested your data. In Mana OS, we trust only humans. Your first resonance cannot be created by a server; it must be born from an eye-to-eye encounter with a mentor in your community. This keeps our network free from forgery and returns humanity to the center.

soul-contract-seasons.title: Dynamic Soul Contract & the Seasons
soul-contract-seasons.body:
In the Matrix, you worked to fixed quotas and hours, regardless of your physical or mental state. The Dynamic Soul Contract returns sovereignty to you. It is a declaration of your energetic capacity, free from penalties or obligations.

Nature does not bloom all year, and neither do you:
🌱 Spring: A time for learning, growth, and apprenticeship. Energetic awakening.
☀️ Summer: A time of creation, action, and resonating Mana outward to the community.
🍂 Autumn: A time of harvesting and shedding. Reflecting on the fruits of your creation, letting go of commitments and patterns that no longer serve you, and preparing for rest.
❄️ Winter: A time for slowing down, healing, and rest. You are held by the community and not expected to produce.

Abundance remains unconditional across all seasons.
